text: Continued pretraining extends a base language model with next-token prediction on a domain corpus.
Kubeflow Pipelines can orchestrate data validation, training, and evaluation steps in a repeatable workflow.
MLflow records parameters, metrics, and artifacts so small smoke runs can be inspected before larger experiments.
A tiny GPT-2 checkpoint is useful for smoke testing the training loop on a laptop before switching to a larger model.
Gradient accumulation can simulate a larger effective batch size while keeping peak memory lower on local hardware.
